message:
feat(core): add timestamps module with clock skew detection

Introduce a dedicated timestamps module providing microsecond-precision
conversion between chrono types and i64, plus monotonic protection against
wall-clock backward jumps (NTP corrections, VM migration). Forward jumps
exceeding 5 minutes are logged as warnings. This ensures stored timestamps
never regress even when the system clock is corrected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
